Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Continued To Oct-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Sautter for and with Frank Grandits and for Walter Fernandez (Co-Trustees).

Ms. Sautter stated that she filed a supplement this morning that responds to the issues raised by the Probate Examiner, and requested that the pecuniary bequests be granted and that the remaining issues in the accounting be continued to allow her time to communicate with the other Beneficiaries with regard to the prior distribution made by the Trustee. The Court granted the pecuniary bequest (subject to review of the order). The remaining issues in the accounting petition were continued to October 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
